title: DC Office Chikkaballapur Civil Servants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 169 Posts
organization: Office of the Deputy Commissioner, District Urban Development Cell (DUDC), Chikkaballapur District, Government of Karnataka
department: Urban Local Bodies (City Municipal Councils) of Chikkaballapur District
short_info: Chikkaballapur District Urban Local Bodies are recruiting 169 Pourakarmika (Sanitation Workers) posts under Direct Payment scheme with ability to speak Kannada as minimum qualification, last date 30 May 2026.

important_dates.where to obtain and submit application f: Respective City Municipal Council office (Chikkaballapur / Chintamani / Shidlaghatta / Gowribidanur)

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are not required to pay any fee at the time of application submission. Application form is to be obtained from the respective City Municipal Council office free of charge.

qualification.education_qualification: Must be able to speak Kannada (Kannada Maatanaadalu Barabeku). No formal educational qualification specified.
qualification.experience: Must have worked as Pourakarmika, Loaders, UGD Helpers, Cleaners, or Helpers on outsource/daily wage/contract basis for a minimum of 1 year in Urban Local Bodies of the district. ESI/PF payment records or Bank Passbook or Attendance Records as proof required.
qualification.domicile: Karnataka State; must be a local resident eligible for municipal sanitation work in the respective ULB area
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application 30/05/2026. This recruitment is specifically for experienced sanitation workers who have worked on outsource/daily wage/contract basis in Urban Local Bodies.

Total Vacant Posts to be Filled under Direct Payment

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Minimum Wages Act, Labour Department (revised periodically); PF and ESI benefits provided

selection_process: 1 (Highest) Candidates who have worked or are currently working as Pourakarmika, Loaders, UGD Helpers, Cleaners or Helpers in district Urban Local Bodies on outsource/daily wage/contract basis for minimum 1 year ESI/PF payment records OR Bank Passbook showing salary credit OR Attendance records for the service period

2 Family member (one per family) of a Pourakarmika who died due to COVID-19 or other reasons while working on outsource/daily wage/contract basis in district Urban Local Bodies Death Certificate, Service proof of deceased Pourakarmika

3 Local sanitation workers with experience working for minimum 1 year as Loaders, UGD Helpers, Cleaners, Helpers in Waste Processing Units, Public Toilets, Zero Waste Management Units on outsource basis in district Urban Local Bodies ESI/PF payment records OR Bank Passbook showing salary credit OR Attendance records

4 Victims identified under the Manual Scavengers Act or their family members (husband/wife/son/daughter) - 10% of total vacancies reserved for this category Certificate from competent authority under Manual Scavengers Act; if eligible candidates not available, posts filled from other categories
5 (Last) Other eligible candidates (after filling vacancies from priority categories 1–4) Relevant certification from competent authority as applicable
Selection is based on a priority system - candidates are considered in the order of priority categories listed below. There is no written examination. After priority-based shortlisting

document verification and medical fitness check will be conducted. Candidates in priority categories 1 to 4 must produce certification from the competent authority. Remaining vacancies after giving priority to categories 1–4 will be filled from other eligible candidates.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only using the prescribed application form. No online application mode is available. The application form is to be obtained from and submitted - along with all required documents - at the office of the respective City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe) where the vacancy exists.
Steps to Apply:
Step 1: Visit the respective City Municipal Council office (Chikkaballapur / Chintamani / Shidlaghatta / Gowribidanur) and collect the prescribed application form.
Step 2: Fill in the application form completely and attach all relevant supporting documents.
Step 3: Submit the duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of all documents at the respective City Municipal Council office on or before 30/05/2026.
Documents to be Submitted with Application:

Proof of prior service as Pourakarmika/Loader/UGD Helper/Cleaner/Helper - ESI/PF payment records OR Bank Passbook showing salary credit for the service period OR Attendance records (minimum 1 year, for Priority 1 and 3 candidates)
Death Certificate of deceased Pourakarmika + his/her service records (for Priority 2 - family members of deceased Pourakarmika)
Certificate from competent authority under the Manual Scavengers Act (for Priority 4 candidates)
Age proof (Birth Certificate / School Leaving Certificate / SSLC / any Govt-issued age proof)
Kannada language proficiency proof (if any)
Residential/Domicile proof
Medical Fitness Certificate from a Medical Officer (to be produced at time of joining)
Notary Affidavit (to be submitted at time of engagement - undertaking not to demand regularisation or approach court for permanency)
Any other certification from the competent authority as applicable to the priority category claimed
Application Form Available At / Submit Application To:
City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe), Chikkaballapur
City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe), Chintamani
City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe), Shidlaghatta
City Municipal Council (Nagarasabhe), Gowribidanur
For queries: E-mail: [email protected] | Phone: 08156-295230
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT A PERMANENT / REGULAR GOVERNMENT JOB. Selected Pourakarmika are appointed on a temporary Direct Payment basis and are NOT entitled to any benefits available to permanent employees. Selected candidates must mandatorily submit a Notary Affidavit undertaking that they will not demand regularisation/permanency individually or through unions and will not approach any court for regularisation at any point. If a Direct Payment Pourakarmika dies during service, his/her family members are NOT entitled to compassionate appointment, pension, gratuity or any other service benefit. Direct Payment Pourakarmika must perform sanitation/cleaning duties ONLY. They cannot be assigned to any other type of work or office duties. No substitute can perform duty in place of the selected candidate - only the selected individual must personally perform all assigned duties. If a selected candidate fails to perform duties or does not follow instructions/advice given by the office head, the concerned Commissioner/Municipal Commissioner may release them from duty without prior notice. Selected employees must comply with all orders/circulars issued by the Government and the Directorate of Municipal Administration from time to time. A Notary Affidavit to this effect is mandatory. Salary will be fixed as per the Minimum Wages Act of the Labour Department and revised periodically. PF and ESI benefits will be provided. Candidates in priority categories 1 to 4 must ensure they have the required certification from the competent authority - without this, their priority claim cannot be considered. For detailed terms and conditions, candidates must visit the respective ULB website (links given in the Important Links section below).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Chikkaballapur Pourakarmika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application is 30 May 2026 at the respective City Municipal Council office.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in Chikkaballapur Sanitation Worker Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 169 Pourakarmika (Sanitation Worker) vacancies are available across four municipal councils.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for Chikkaballapur Pourakarmika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline only, and candidates must submit the form at the respective municipal office.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Chikkaballapur Sanitation Worker posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must know Kannada and have at least 1 year of experience in sanitation-related work in Urban Local Bodies.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Chikkaballapur Pourakarmika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 50 years as on 30 May 2026 for all categories.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee, and the form can be obtained free of cost from municipal offices.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Pourakarmika (Sanitation Worker) posts?
faq.answer: Salary is paid as per the Minimum Wages Act, along with PF and ESI benefits.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Chikkaballapur Sanitation Worker Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on priority categories (experience-based) followed by document verification and medical fitness.
